recommendations.title: Mass
recommendations.overview: Two couples meet for a painful and raw conversation in the aftermath of a violent tragedy.

recommendations.title: The Hurricane
recommendations.overview: The story of Rubin "Hurricane" Carter, a boxer wrongly imprisoned for murder, and the people who aided in his fight to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Klaus
recommendations.overview: A selfish postman and a reclusive toymaker form an unlikely friendship, delivering joy to a cold, dark town that desperately needs it.

recommendations.title: Coach Carter
recommendations.overview: Based on a true story, in which Richmond High School head basketball coach Ken Carter made headlines in 1999 for benching his undefeated team due to poor academic results.
